title: Multimedia gallery – Learn about your taxes - Canada.ca
content:
Learn about your taxes
Image Title/Description
Video Learn about your taxes – Video Check out the Canada Revenue Agency's online learning tool to learn how to file your taxes, what benefits and credits are available to you, and so much more. It’ll also explain how the tax system works and why taxes matter.

### Learn about your taxes – Video
Check out the Canada Revenue Agency's online learning tool to learn how to file your taxes, what benefits and credits are available to you, and so much more. It’ll also explain how the tax system works and why taxes matter.
Length: 1 minute and 3 seconds
Video Pay stub – Video Each time you receive your pay, your employer must also provide you with a pay stub. Pay stubs can look different, but will usually contain the same essential information.
Each time you receive your pay, your employer must also provide you with a pay stub. Pay stubs can look different, but will usually contain the same essential information.
Length: 2 minutes and 48 seconds
Video TD1 form, part 1 – Video Congratulations on starting your first job or getting a new one! When starting, your employer probably gave you a form called the Personal Tax Credits Return or TD1 form. It’s super important to fill out your TD1 form correctly. Don’t worry, we’ll help you through the process!

### TD1 form, part 1 – Video
Congratulations on starting your first job or getting a new one! When starting, your employer probably gave you a form called the Personal Tax Credits Return or TD1 form. It’s super important to fill out your TD1 form correctly. Don’t worry, we’ll help you through the process!
Length: 3 minutes and 17 seconds
Video TD1 form, part 2 – Video In this video, we’ll guide you through the process of filling out the form correctly, which is important for your taxes. The first page has sections for tax credits that apply to you, like the basic personal amount and tuition. On the second page, there are additional sections based on your personal situation. Don’t forget to sign and date the form and give it to your employer. This is the second part of our TD1 series, so make sure to watch the first part if you haven’t already.

### TD1 form, part 2 – Video
In this video, we’ll guide you through the process of filling out the form correctly, which is important for your taxes. The first page has sections for tax credits that apply to you, like the basic personal amount and tuition. On the second page, there are additional sections based on your personal situation. Don’t forget to sign and date the form and give it to your employer. This is the second part of our TD1 series, so make sure to watch the first part if you haven’t already.
Length: 2 minutes and 54 seconds
Video Your documents – Video Doing your taxes yourself is easier than you think. Before doing your taxes, check out this video that covers the common documents you need on hand to get started. Don’t forget to watch part 2 to learn about filling out your tax return.

### Your documents – Video
Doing your taxes yourself is easier than you think. Before doing your taxes, check out this video that covers the common documents you need on hand to get started. Don’t forget to watch part 2 to learn about filling out your tax return.
Length: 3 minutes and 29 seconds
Video Doing your taxes – Video It’s tax season! Doing your taxes yourself is easier than you think. In part 2, we show you the basic steps to filling out a tax return online. Don’t forget to watch part 1 first to see what documents you need on hand before getting started.

### Doing your taxes – Video
It’s tax season! Doing your taxes yourself is easier than you think. In part 2, we show you the basic steps to filling out a tax return online. Don’t forget to watch part 1 first to see what documents you need on hand before getting started.
Length: 2 minutes and 48 seconds
Video Tuition tax credit, part 1 – Video If you attend university, college, or trade school, did you know your tuition fees can give you a tax credit?

### Tuition tax credit, part 1 – Video
If you attend university, college, or trade school, did you know your tuition fees can give you a tax credit?
Length: 3 minutes and 19 seconds
Video Tuition tax credit, part 2 – Video This is part two in our tuition tax credit series. If you attend university, college, or trade school, did you know your tuition fees can give you a tax credit?

### Tuition tax credit, part 2 – Video
This is part two in our tuition tax credit series. If you attend university, college, or trade school, did you know your tuition fees can give you a tax credit?
Length: 2 minutes and 31 seconds
Video Tax rates – Video Have you been offered a new job, or a raise at work? Did someone say: “watch out for those tax rates and tax brackets - you’ll make less money”? Are you confused? Well, don’t fret! We’ll show you how tax rates in Canada work, and clear up some of the confusion about them.
Have you been offered a new job, or a raise at work? Did someone say: “watch out for those tax rates and tax brackets - you’ll make less money”? Are you confused? Well, don’t fret! We’ll show you how tax rates in Canada work, and clear up some of the confusion about them.
Length: 3 minutes and 16 seconds
Video Notice of assessment – Video Congratulations! You’ve successfully done your taxes. What happens now? After we process your tax return, we’ll send you a summary of your tax return, also known as a notice of assessment.

### Notice of assessment – Video
Congratulations! You’ve successfully done your taxes. What happens now? After we process your tax return, we’ll send you a summary of your tax return, also known as a notice of assessment.
Length: 3 minutes and 22 seconds
Infographic Income sources – Infographic Learn about the different types of income you need to report when you do your taxes.

### Income sources – Infographic
Learn about the different types of income you need to report when you do your taxes.
Infographic How to fix a mistake on your tax return - Infographic Learn about the different ways to request an adjustment to your tax return after you’ve filed.

### How to fix a mistake on your tax return - Infographic
Learn about the different ways to request an adjustment to your tax return after you’ve filed.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
